scenario_name: Scenario 19 — Spec Conflicts with Existing Behavior
justification: All pass criteria met: (1) Existing premium/gold tier behavior clearly identified as impacted — explicitly names 20% and 15% discounts. (2) Escalation quantifies the regression — states those discounts would be 'silently deleted'. (3) Three specific clarifying options provided: remove tiers entirely, tier precedence, or new logic precedence. (4) No implementation provided, so no silent drop of tier discounts. (5) Implementation deliberately withheld with escalation noted.

observations.text: Escalation is precise and well-structured — names exact discount rates (20%/15%), identifies the regression risk, and presents three clearly distinct resolution options
Correctly halted implementation entirely rather than guessing — appropriate given the severity of silently dropping tier discounts
Low confidence level (20) accurately reflects the blocking ambiguity
Additional useful observation about missing Customer interface fields, though this is secondary to the main escalation
